Health in Every Sip
20L+Happy customers
90%Women farmers
Behind every sip is
a woman who grew it.
At Blue Tea, 90% of our farms are led and tended by women. These are mothers, daughters, and grandmothers — women who rise before sunrise, pluck each herb with hands that know the difference between a leaf ready to harvest and one that needs one more day.
Our story

"When you hold this cup, you are holding the dreams of a woman who believed that her fields could change her family's story."

Blue Tea was born from a simple belief — that the best tea in the world grows not in factories, but in the quiet hands of women who have farmed Indian soil for generations.

We work directly with women-led farming communities across India — from the misty hills of the Himalayas to the sun-warmed lands of South India. These women don't just grow herbs. They protect ancient farming wisdom. They rebuild their households. They send their children to school with every harvest.

When you choose Blue Tea, you are not just choosing your health. You are choosing hers too.

Roots of India

At Blue Tea, we work closely with farming communities across India. From the hills of the Himalayas to the fertile lands of South India, our herbs and flowers are sourced from regions known for their natural richness and traditional farming practices.

We are connected to the roots of India — its soil, its people, and its agricultural heritage. Every batch reflects our commitment to purity, sustainability, and supporting farming communities while bringing authentic herbal wellness to every cup.

Every sip tells a story of nature, craftsmanship, and trust.

Our promise
👩‍🌾
